title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 94.540 - Applicable provisions
text:
94.540.  Applicable provisions. — Except as modified in sections 94.500 to 94.550, all provisions of sections 32.085 and 32.087 shall apply to the tax imposed under sections 94.500 to 94.550.
(L. 1969 p. 166 § 5, A.L. 1976 H.B. 1384, A.L. 1979 H.B. 726, H.B. 296, A.L. 1991 H.B. 29)
